summary: recap --by tag: use sum of bucket totals as the share_pct denominator so percentages do not exceed 100% when entries carry multiple tags.
reason: Greptile pass-2 P2 (logic). grand counted each entry once, but the tag branch added the full entry duration to every tag bucket, so multi-tagged entries produced per-tag shares that summed to more than 100% (visible in both the table and the JSON share_pct field). project and client modes are unaffected; grand still drives total_hours and the header line.
